raw_request: Implement the classic Snake game with arrow key controls, increasing speed as the snake grows, and score tracking. Record all game states throughout a session and allow users to replay any completed game at variable speeds (0.5×, 1×, 2×, 4×). Include a ghost snake that shows the replay of a prior game on the same grid while the user is actively playing a new game simultaneously.
primary_goal: Build a complete Snake game with replay system allowing users to play live games and watch ghost replays simultaneously on the same grid at variable playback speeds
user_pain_point: Classic game need modern replay features for learning, competition, and entertainment; simultaneous ghost replay enables comparing strategies in real-time

in_scope: Core Snake game (movement, collision, food, score, speed increase)
State serialization for every game state
Replay recording and playback at 0.5×, 1×, 2×, 4× speeds
Ghost snake rendering and coexistence with live game
Input handling preventing reverse direction in single move
out_of_scope: Time rewind / undo moves (stretch goal only)
Leaderboard and shareable links (stretch goal only)
Mobile touch controls (not specified in requirements)
ambiguous: Grid dimensions and cell size not specified — assuming 30×30 grid with 10px cells based on typical Snake implementations
Initial snake size not specified — assuming 3 cells horizontal at center
Food spawn algorithm not specified — assuming random empty cell
Speed increase mechanics not specified — assuming +1 FPS per food eaten, capped at reasonable maximum

affected_areas: Rendering (grid, snake, food, ghost snake overlay)
UI (game controls, replay list, speed selector)

may_enable: Future enhancements (mobile UI, multiplayer, difficulty modes)

ambiguities: Grid dimensions assumed 30×30 based on standard Snake implementations
Initial speed assumed 5 FPS; speed increase assumed +1 FPS per food
Food spawn algorithm assumed random; no algorithm specified in requirements
Ghost snake collision assumed visual-only; no collision logic between ghost and live snake
Replay list storage assumed in-memory or localStorage; cloud persistence not mentioned
Speed multipliers (0.5×, 1×, 2×, 4×) are discrete; continuous speed not requested

links_to_requirements: Key technical requirement: Prevent reverse direction in single move
Key technical requirement: Collision detection for walls and body
Key technical requirement: State serialization for accurate replay
Key technical requirement: Ghost snake rendering without interference
traceability.addresses_expected_outcome: User can play complete Snake game, end game triggers on wall/self-collision, speed increases with snake length, replay is bit-exact, ghost and live snake coexist on same grid without collision
